Localization.Description: A possible exploitation of the DCShadow attack has been discovered, which allows you to create a fake domain controller in an Active Directory environment to make malicious changes to this environment. Attackers can use this attack to gain a foothold in the infrastructure and avoid detection

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Possible use of the DCShadow attack by the user {subject.account.name} from address {src.host} is detected on host {event_src.host}
